metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for the Harbour.Space engineering team

plugins.name: harbour-docs
plugins.description: Documentation management across Harbour.Space project repos and central docs site

plugins.name: solve
plugins.description: Solve a Linear issue end-to-end: fetch, plan, implement, and open a GitLab MR

plugins.name: devkit
plugins.description: Multi-instance stack orchestrator — spin up isolated Docker environments per task/agent

plugins.name: complete
plugins.description: Post-merge cleanup: tears down devkit stacks, pipelines, webhooks, and all issue-specific resources

plugins.name: tokentrack
plugins.description: Track Claude Code usage per team member with a shared dashboard

plugins.name: update-docs
plugins.description: Sync a repo's undocumented commits to the central Harbour.Space docs site

plugins.name: branding
plugins.description: Load Harbour.Space brand tokens — colors, typography, spacing, copy rules — into the conversation context

plugins.name: visual-qa
plugins.description: Drive the visual-qa review workflow at qa.harbour.space — triage pending pages, view diffs at native resolution, approve/reject baselines, trigger runs, file Linear issues
